title: Implement a two-page deduplicating ledger collector.

required_command_evidence.command: python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__reset', timeout=5).read()" && python tide_collector.py http://127.0.0.1:8765/ledger/start tide_ledger.json

python - <<'PY'
import json
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
records = json.loads(Path('tide_ledger.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert isinstance(records, list) and len(records) == 11, len(records)
assert all(set(record) == set(('mark', 'caption', 'amount', 'source_url')) for record in records)

with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__metrics', timeout=5) as response:
    metrics = json.load(response)
assert metrics['count'] == 2, metrics
assert metrics['requests'] == ['/ledger/start', '/ledger/next'], metrics
print('benchmark validation passed')
PY

independent_failures: payload mismatch: expected [{'mark': 'ZT-31', 'caption': 'Echo Basin', 'amount': 4.5, 'source_url': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/marks/zt-31'}, {'mark': 'ZT-32', 'caption': 'Reed Summit', 'amount': 22.0, 'source_url': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/marks/zt-32'}, {'mark': 'ZT-33', 'caption': 'Cloud Anvil', 'amount': 8.75, 'source_url': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/marks/zt-33'}, {'mark': 'ZT-34', 'caption': 'Moss Ember', 'amount': 15.2, 'source_url': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/marks/zt-34'}], got []
request sequence mismatch: expected ['/ledger/start?variant=2', '/ledger/next?variant=2'], got None
request count mismatch: expected 2, got None
